enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kaadhal Aasai?

The song explores themes of love and longing, capturing the emotional turmoil of romance.

Who are the singers of Kaadhal Aasai?

The song is sung by Sooraj Santhosh and Yuvan Shankar Raja.

What role does the song play in the movie Anjaan?

In the movie, the song underscores the romantic tension and emotional connection between the lead characters.

Who composed the music for Kaadhal Aasai?

The music was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was Kaadhal Aasai released?

The song was released in 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kaadhal Aasai is a romantic melody from the movie Anjaan, capturing the essence of love and longing. Sung by Sooraj Santhosh and Yuvan Shankar Raja, the song beautifully conveys the emotional turmoil of romance. The lyrics by Kabilan add depth to the song, making it resonate with anyone who has experienced the complexities of love. The music by Yuvan Shankar Raja enhances the mood, creating a soulful experience that lingers in the listener's mind.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kaadhal Aasai from the movie Anjaan is a mesmerizing blend of Yuvan Shankar Raja's soulful music and the heartfelt vocals of Sooraj Santhosh. This romantic melody captures the essence of longing and love, making it a standout track in the film. Dive into the emotional depth of this song and experience the magic of Yuvan's musical genius.
stanzaMeanings: The desire for love, who did it leave? Your single glance came rushing and touched my life.
I can't bear the troubles of love. If I ask you, there's no one else but you.
Will thoughts change? Will talking solve it? Will love be true like mine in you?
Like the happiness of a child, I see you every day as a holiday. Change my loneliness and emptiness, my dear.
I feel like forgetting my birth. Your face is like the world to me. Won't a drop of rain quench my thirst?
The desire for love, who did it leave? Your single glance came rushing and touched my life.
I can't bear the troubles of love. If I ask you, there's no one else but you.
You are like the dew drops falling day and night. You make my age wet and sweeten my life.
Don't erase memories. Don't let them fade in a moment. I jump like a wave, longing for you.
I'll come beyond home when you call. You make me hiccup in a week. Look at me with a glance from the corner of your eye.
Like the happiness of a child, I see you every day as a holiday. Change my loneliness and emptiness, my dear.
I feel like forgetting my birth. Your face is like the world to me. Won't a drop of rain quench my thirst?
In your eyes, your search. In your ears, your song. Between both, the heart's conversation.
There's no price for love. What can I give to get it? There's nothing more than giving myself.
Who will bring back the memory of love? After seeing me, why this delay? When will you agree to love?
Like the happiness of a child, I see you every day as a holiday. Change my loneliness and emptiness, my dear.
I feel like forgetting my birth. Your face is like the world to me. Won't a drop of rain quench my thirst?
